## Checklist

- [ ] Content is accurate and referenced to official docs where applicable
- [ ] File naming follows `lowercase-kebab-case` convention
- [ ] Images are in `assets/images/{provider}/` and have descriptive `alt` text
- [ ] Every new folder has a `README.md`
- [ ] No broken relative links (verified locally or via CI)
- [ ] No external image URLs embedded in Markdown
- [ ] No old `AWS-Learnings` branding remaining
- [ ] `./scripts/validate-repo.sh` passes locally (if applicable)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated with a brief entry
